latest_messages.headline: Week ending 2026-05-29: 0.00% | SPY +1.43% | alpha −1.43% | grade D
latest_messages.body: Zero trades this week — account sat in cash while SPY rallied 1.43%, so we lagged the market by 1.43% (that's negative alpha). Top win: none. Top loss: opportunity cost — fifth straight week with no new positions. Lesson: holding cash is itself a bet, and this week it lost. Strategy change: none (one quiet week isn't enough to change rules; the fix is execution). Resuming normal routine cadence Monday 6/01 with a fresh pre-market scout.
